mapper.select: SELECT product_id as id, product_name as productName, product_type as productType, interest_rate as interestRate, min_amount as minAmount, max_amount as maxAmount, term_months as termMonths, description, created_at as createdAt, updated_at as updatedAt FROM DEPOSIT_PRODUCT_TBL ORDER BY product_id DESC

SELECT product_id as id, product_name as productName, product_type as productType, interest_rate as interestRate, min_amount as minAmount, max_amount as maxAmount, term_months as termMonths, description, created_at as createdAt, updated_at as updatedAt FROM SAVINGS_PRODUCT_TBL ORDER BY product_id DESC

SELECT dat_id as id, customer_id as customerId, product_id as productId, account_number as accountNumber, account_password as accountPassword, balance, interest_rate as interestRate, account_status as accountStatus, auto_transfer_enabled as autoTransferEnabled, auto_transfer_amount as autoTransferAmount, auto_transfer_day as autoTransferDay, created_at as createdAt, updated_at as updatedAt FROM DEPOSIT_ACCOUNT_TBL WHERE customer_id = #{customerId} ORDER BY dat_id DESC

SELECT sat_id as id, customer_id as customerId, product_id as productId, account_number as accountNumber, account_password as accountPassword, balance, interest_rate as interestRate, account_status as accountStatus, monthly_amount as monthlyAmount, maturity_date as maturityDate, created_at as createdAt, updated_at as updatedAt FROM SAVINGS_ACCOUNT_TBL WHERE customer_id = #{customerId} ORDER BY sat_id DESC

SELECT product_id as id, product_name as productName, product_type as productType, interest_rate as interestRate, min_amount as minAmount, max_amount as maxAmount, term_months as termMonths, description, created_at as createdAt, updated_at as updatedAt FROM DEPOSIT_PRODUCT_TBL WHERE product_id = #{productId}

SELECT product_id as id, product_name as productName, product_type as productType, interest_rate as interestRate, min_amount as minAmount, max_amount as maxAmount, term_months as termMonths, description, created_at as createdAt, updated_at as updatedAt FROM SAVINGS_PRODUCT_TBL WHERE product_id = #{productId}

SELECT dat_id as id, customer_id as customerId, product_id as productId, account_number as accountNumber, account_password as accountPassword, balance, interest_rate as interestRate, account_status as accountStatus, auto_transfer_enabled as autoTransferEnabled, auto_transfer_amount as autoTransferAmount, auto_transfer_day as autoTransferDay, created_at as createdAt, updated_at as updatedAt FROM DEPOSIT_ACCOUNT_TBL WHERE dat_id = #{accountId}

SELECT sat_id as id, customer_id as customerId, product_id as productId, account_number as accountNumber, account_password as accountPassword, balance, interest_rate as interestRate, account_status as accountStatus, monthly_amount as monthlyAmount, maturity_date as maturityDate, created_at as createdAt, updated_at as updatedAt FROM SAVINGS_ACCOUNT_TBL WHERE sat_id = #{accountId}
mapper.insert: INSERT INTO DEPOSIT_ACCOUNT_TBL ( customer_id, product_id, account_number, account_password, balance, interest_rate, account_status, auto_transfer_enabled, auto_transfer_amount, auto_transfer_day, created_at, updated_at ) VALUES ( #{customerId}, #{productId}, #{accountNumber}, #{accountPassword}, 0, #{interestRate}, 'ACTIVE', #{autoTransferEnabled}, #{autoTransferAmount}, #{autoTransferDay}, NOW(), NOW() )

INSERT INTO SAVINGS_ACCOUNT_TBL ( customer_id, product_id, account_number, account_password, balance, interest_rate, account_status, monthly_amount, maturity_date, created_at, updated_at ) VALUES ( #{customerId}, #{productId}, #{accountNumber}, #{accountPassword}, 0, #{interestRate}, 'ACTIVE', #{monthlyAmount}, #{maturityDate}, NOW(), NOW() )
mapper.select: SELECT COUNT(*) FROM ( SELECT account_number FROM DEPOSIT_ACCOUNT_TBL UNION ALL SELECT account_number FROM SAVINGS_ACCOUNT_TBL ) AS all_accounts WHERE account_number = #{accountNumber}
mapper.update: UPDATE DEPOSIT_ACCOUNT_TBL SET balance = balance + #{amount}, updated_at = NOW() WHERE dat_id = #{accountId} AND account_status = 'ACTIVE'
UPDATE SAVINGS_ACCOUNT_TBL SET balance = balance + #{amount}, updated_at = NOW() WHERE sat_id = #{accountId} AND account_status = 'ACTIVE'
mapper.insert: INSERT INTO DEPOSIT_TRANSACTION_TBL ( dat_id, transaction_type, amount, balance, description, created_at ) VALUES ( #{id}, #{transactionType}, #{amount}, #{balance}, #{description}, NOW() )
INSERT INTO SAVINGS_TRANSACTION_TBL ( sat_id, transaction_type, amount, balance, description, created_at ) VALUES ( #{id}, #{transactionType}, #{amount}, #{balance}, #{description}, NOW() )
mapper.select: SELECT dtt_id as id, dat_id as accountId, transaction_type as transactionType, amount, balance, description, created_at as createdAt FROM DEPOSIT_TRANSACTION_TBL WHERE dat_id = #{accountId} AND created_at BETWEEN #{startDate} AND #{endDate} ORDER BY created_at DESC

SELECT stt_id as id, sat_id as accountId, transaction_type as transactionType, amount, balance, description, created_at as createdAt FROM SAVINGS_TRANSACTION_TBL WHERE sat_id = #{accountId} AND created_at BETWEEN #{startDate} AND #{endDate} ORDER BY created_at DESC
mapper.update: UPDATE DEPOSIT_ACCOUNT_TBL SET auto_transfer_enabled = #{enabled}, auto_transfer_amount = #{amount}, auto_transfer_day = #{transferDay}, updated_at = NOW() WHERE dat_id = #{accountId} AND account_status = 'ACTIVE'
mapper.select: SELECT dat_id as id, customer_id as customerId, product_id as productId, account_number as accountNumber, account_password as accountPassword, balance, interest_rate as interestRate, account_status as accountStatus, auto_transfer_enabled as autoTransferEnabled, auto_transfer_amount as autoTransferAmount, auto_transfer_day as autoTransferDay, created_at as createdAt, updated_at as updatedAt FROM DEPOSIT_ACCOUNT_TBL WHERE account_status = 'ACTIVE' AND auto_transfer_enabled = true AND auto_transfer_day = #{today}
mapper.update: UPDATE DEPOSIT_ACCOUNT_TBL SET balance = balance + #{amount}, updated_at = NOW() WHERE dat_id = #{accountId} AND account_status = 'ACTIVE'
mapper.select: SELECT sat_id as id, customer_id as customerId, product_id as productId, account_number as accountNumber, account_password as accountPassword, balance, interest_rate as interestRate, account_status as accountStatus, monthly_amount as monthlyAmount, maturity_date as maturityDate, created_at as createdAt, updated_at as updatedAt FROM SAVINGS_ACCOUNT_TBL WHERE account_status = 'ACTIVE' AND maturity_date = #{today}
mapper.update: UPDATE SAVINGS_ACCOUNT_TBL SET balance = balance + #{interestAmount}, updated_at = NOW() WHERE sat_id = #{accountId} AND account_status = 'ACTIVE'
UPDATE SAVINGS_ACCOUNT_TBL SET account_status = #{status}, updated_at = NOW() WHERE sat_id = #{accountId}
mapper.select: SELECT dat_id as id, customer_id as customerId, product_id as productId, account_number as accountNumber, account_password as accountPassword, balance, interest_rate as interestRate, account_status as accountStatus, auto_transfer_enabled as autoTransferEnabled, auto_transfer_amount as autoTransferAmount, auto_transfer_day as autoTransferDay, created_at as createdAt, updated_at as updatedAt FROM DEPOSIT_ACCOUNT_TBL WHERE account_status = 'ACTIVE' AND DAY(created_at) = DAY(#{today})

SELECT sat_id as id, customer_id as customerId, product_id as productId, account_number as accountNumber, account_password as accountPassword, balance, interest_rate as interestRate, account_status as accountStatus, monthly_amount as monthlyAmount, maturity_date as maturityDate, created_at as createdAt, updated_at as updatedAt FROM SAVINGS_ACCOUNT_TBL WHERE account_status = 'ACTIVE' AND DAY(created_at) = DAY(#{today})
mapper.update: UPDATE DEPOSIT_ACCOUNT_TBL SET balance = balance + #{interestAmount}, updated_at = NOW() WHERE dat_id = #{accountId} AND account_status = 'ACTIVE'
UPDATE SAVINGS_ACCOUNT_TBL SET balance = balance + #{interestAmount}, updated_at = NOW() WHERE sat_id = #{accountId} AND account_status = 'ACTIVE'
